posts.text:
I was deeply proud to stand alongside my good friend @SenMullin today to support his nomination to be the next Secretary of Homeland Security. He and Christie are dear friends to Wesley and me, and we are thrilled to see him step into this new role.

Markwayne is a man of deep faith and conviction, is driven by principle, and never backs down from a cause, person, or purpose he believes in. His strong character, love for our nation, and determination are exactly what this country deserves in our

Attending the dignified transfer alongside @POTUS, @SecWar, and several of my colleagues for our six fallen servicemembers today was humbling and heartbreaking. 

Three of the servicemembers were stationed at Sumpter Smith Joint National Guard Base in Birmingham: Alabama native Maj. Alex Klinner, Captain Ariana G. Savino, and Technical Sergeant Ashley B. Pruitt.

Wesley and I will be forever grateful to these heroes for their exemplary service and ultimate sacrifice. We ask that all Alabamians j

Great to catch up with Dr. Watts and discuss the incredible work UAB is doing across our state and its commitment to advancing lifesaving research.

From research to patient care, proud to see @UABNews recognized as one of the nation’s largest hospitals—now the 5th largest in the United States—delivering life-changing care to patients across Alabama and our country.

Alabama knows how important it is to protect our workers in high-heat environments.

That’s why I’m proud to join @SenBillCassidy in calling to repeal the disastrous Biden-era heat rule and support practical, effective standards that keep workers safe. britt.senate.gov/news/press-…

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA.

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.

I’m honored to receive the Hometown Heroes Award from @AL_League as I continue to ensure that every room I’m in, Alabama has a strong seat at the table.

Nothing is more important to me than growing opportunity in our state, and I’m fortunate to have such outstanding state partners who share this goal and actively communicate the needs and priorities of their communities. britt.senate.gov/news/press-…

I was proud to join the Minth Group recently as they unveiled their latest steel facility. Thanks to their investment, Alabama will continue leading in auto manufacturing—creating jobs, strengthening our communities, and building a more competitive future right here in Gadsden.


Alabama Community College System (ACCS) (@ACCS_Education)

A $430M investment and 1,300+ jobs are coming to the Gadsden area! 

Minth Group Limited is building a new manufacturing campus, with leaders including @SenKati

Proud to vote to advance the SAVE America Act! Let’s get this done.


Mike Lee (@BasedMikeLee)

The Senate has officially proceeded to the House-passed SAVE America Act

We must stay on this … until it’s passed into law

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BasedMikeLee/status/2033997692905369948#m

Ensuring only American citizens vote in federal elections by requiring voter ID is commonsense. We must protect the security and integrity of our elections.

I’m proud to be a cosponsor of the SAVE America Act. 🇺🇸

It was wonderful to visit with students and educators from Montgomery Academy recently. I’m always encouraged and inspired by the next generation of Alabama leaders—thank you for making the trip up to Washington!

TSA officers have now missed 46% of their paychecks this fiscal year because Democrats refuse to fully fund DHS. 

Democrats have forgotten that Congress is supposed to work for the American people, not use them as political pawns to advance a radical, open-borders agenda that Americans rejected.


Senate Republicans (@SenateGOP)

Democrats withheld TSA agents’ paychecks for 43 days last year and now for 32 days this year.

Americans have seen the resulting chaos at our airports.



— https://ni
I always have a great morning at Coffee with Katie hearing directly from constituents, and last week, we enjoyed some delicious Hello Chonky cookies from Enterprise, Alabama!

Daily reminder that Democrats blocked funding for HOMELAND SECURITY including the Coast Guard, Secret Service, and TSA.

ICE and CBP are still funded and will continue to deport criminal illegal aliens.

Please join Wesley and me as we pray for strength and healing for Susie and support for her family, friends, and loved ones.

Susie is the best of the best, and we know she’s going to give this fight everything she’s got and come out on top.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2033573681973133389#m

TSA officers have gone 74 days without a paycheck in FY26 because of Democrats’ two shutdowns. This is absolutely unacceptable. 

Democrats need to end their political posturing, stop using our TSA agents as political pawns, and fully fund DHS.


Secretary Sean Duffy (@SecDuffy)

🚨AIRLINE CEOs: ENOUGH OF THE SCHUMER DHS SHUTDOWN🚨

Kudos to the CEOs from our airlines and shipping companies for standing up for @TSA workers as they go into another week without getting paid! ✍️⬇️





— https://nitt

Democrats could end the suffering they’re inflicting upon hundreds of thousands of Americans today.

It’s time for Democrats to stop pandering to their political base and fund ALL of DHS so we can pay EVERY SINGLE man and woman who is working to keep our nation secure.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)

WSJ EDITORIAL BOARD: "As the lines at airport security get worse, frustrated travelers should know who’s to blame: Sen. Chuck Schumer."
wsj.com/opinion/tsa-lines-dh…




— https://nitter.net
